title: cirsium praeteriens
intro: Cirsium praeteriens, also known as the roadside thistle, is a species of thistle that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Cirsium praeteriens is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
